cards.title: Emotional Maturity Key to Raising Happy Children
cards.body: Psychologist Lindsay C Gibson's book on emotionally immature parents became a pandemic bestseller. Her new advice focuses on raising happy, healthy children by developing emotional maturity at any age.

cards.title: Parenting Teens Through A-Levels Is Helpless
cards.body: Parents supporting teenagers through A-level exams often feel completely impotent despite trying their best. Flashcards for chemistry and further maths fill parents with unique kinds of horror.

cards.title: Healthy Family Space Supports Growth
cards.body: Living apart can bring guilt and sadness to families, yet healthy boundaries help children and parents grow. Love and connection remain intact even when family members maintain separate spaces.

cards.title: Why ADHD May Look Different in Children
cards.body: ADHD assessments must account for cultural context and life transitions, not just surface symptoms. Understanding a child's full background reveals a clearer diagnostic picture.

cards.title: Body-Focused Repetitive Behaviors in Children
cards.body: Children with BFRBs like hair-pulling don't need to be ready to stop for treatment to work. Meaningful progress happens before willingness arrives.

cards.title: TikTok and YouTube Safety for Kids Questioned
cards.body: UK regulator Ofcom says TikTok and YouTube aren't safe enough for children. Both platforms dispute the findings, citing their safety features and protections.

cards.title: Illegal Children's Homes Still Funded by Councils
cards.body: Councils continue paying up to £2m per child for illegal residential placements despite bans. This practice leaves children in unregulated and unsafe environments.

cards.title: Cinema Bans Unaccompanied Under-16s
cards.body: A UK cinema has introduced an age restriction after complaints about anti-social behavior from young visitors. Damaged seats and disruptions prompted the controversial ban.

cards.title: Youngest Premier League Player Sits GCSEs
cards.body: Max Dowman, the youngest player in Premier League history, had to take GCSE exams days after winning the title. The 17-year-old balanced professional football with final school exams.

cards.title: Vanished Child Tells His Story After 6 Years
cards.body: Alex Batty disappeared at age 11 when he thought he was going on holiday, only to vanish for six years. His story of disappearance and return raises important child safety questions.
